// OUR MISSION

The intelligence gap between institutions and retail investors ends here.

Every retail investor has access to the same execution platforms. None of them have what institutional traders take for granted — intelligence built around their specific goals, risk profile, and time horizon.

They're making real financial decisions based on Reddit threads and CNBC segments. Not because they're not smart. Because the tools have never existed for them.

We built those tools. Trading-Floor gives every retail investor a shortcut and an unfair advantage — a personalized investment advisor that knows exactly who they are and what they're trying to do.

PROBLEM 01

The information gap

Institutional traders have access to personalized research, risk analysis, and market intelligence built around their specific situation. Retail investors have execution platforms. That's it.

PROBLEM 02

The people who want to invest but haven't

The barrier isn't money. It's time and knowledge. They don't know where to start and don't have hours to learn. We give them a shortcut — tell us who you are, we tell you where to invest.

// HOW IT WORKS

Tell us who you are.
We tell you where to invest.

01

Profile

Tell us your goals, risk tolerance, capital, and time horizon. We build a personalized investor archetype specific to you.

02

Picks

Receive a personalized list of stocks matched to your exact profile — not a generic top-10 list, not what everyone else sees.

03

Intelligence

Live market data, predictive technical analysis, and a risk score on every position. Know what you're getting into before you get in.

04

Execute

Know if a trade fits your profile before you pull the trigger. Execution via our licensed clearing partner once we launch.

// PLATFORM FEATURES

Built for serious investors.
Simple enough for anyone.

⚖

Portfolio Weighting

Every recommendation comes with a suggested portfolio weight — how much of your capital should go into each position based on your specific risk profile, time horizon, and existing holdings. Aggressive profiles receive concentrated high-conviction weights. Conservative profiles receive diversified, lower-volatility allocations. The weighting engine adjusts in real time as market conditions change, keeping your portfolio aligned to who you are as an investor, not who you were when you signed up.

📊

Historical Performance Testing

Before any recommendation is surfaced to a user, it was tested against historical price data. The platform analyzed how each stock pick would have performed across multiple market conditions — bull markets, corrections, high-volatility periods, and sector rotations — matched against investor profiles similar to the user receiving the recommendation. This process validated which recommendation patterns held up under real market history and which didn't, and that filtered output is what powers every pick on the platform today.

// IMPORTANT DISCLOSURE

Past performance of historical testing does not guarantee future results. All investing involves risk including possible loss of principal.

// REGULATORY DISCLOSURES

Registration & Licensing Status

Trading-Floor is currently following the required regulatory path to become a fully registered and legally compliant brokerage. The company is not yet registered as a broker-dealer with FINRA or the SEC, and is not yet registered as an Investment Adviser with the SEC or any state securities authority. Trading-Floor is actively working toward full dual registration as a broker-dealer (BD) and registered investment adviser (RIA).

Trading-Floor is actively following the required regulatory path to full broker-dealer (BD) and registered investment adviser (RIA) dual registration with the SEC and FINRA. Until all required registrations are in place, Trading-Floor will not execute securities transactions, provide individualized investment advice, or hold client funds.

The current beta product is provided strictly for informational and demonstration purposes. Nothing on this platform constitutes a solicitation to buy or sell any security.

Investment Risk Disclosures

RISK OF LOSS

All investing involves risk, including the possible loss of principal. The value of investments may fluctuate and investors may receive back less than they invest.

NO GUARANTEE OF RETURNS

Past performance, including the results of historical performance testing, is not indicative of future results. AI-generated recommendations are based on historical data and algorithms and do not guarantee any specific outcome.

INFORMATIONAL USE ONLY

Content generated by the Trading-Floor platform, including stock picks, portfolio weightings, risk scores, and market analysis, is provided for informational purposes only and does not constitute personalized investment advice, a recommendation to buy or sell any security, or an offer to provide investment advisory services.

NO COMPENSATION FOR INFORMATION

Trading-Floor does not receive compensation of any kind for any information, analysis, recommendations, or content provided on this platform. No fees are charged to users, no commissions are collected, and no payment-for-order-flow or third-party compensation arrangements exist. All content is provided entirely free of charge for research and informational purposes only, in support of the company's transition to a fully registered brokerage.

RESEARCH & DEMONSTRATION PURPOSE

This platform exists solely to demonstrate the Trading-Floor product concept and to facilitate the company's regulatory transition to a fully registered and legally compliant brokerage. The platform is not currently operational as a brokerage and does not execute trades, hold client funds, or manage client portfolios.

NOT FDIC OR SIPC INSURED

Trading-Floor is not a bank. Securities products and services offered through Trading-Floor are not FDIC insured, are not bank deposits, carry no bank guarantee, and may lose value. Until SIPC membership is obtained, client assets are not covered by SIPC protection.

// FULL REGULATORY DISCLAIMER

Trading-Floor ("Trading-Floor") is a technology company currently following the required regulatory path to become a fully registered and legally compliant brokerage, including dual registration as a broker-dealer and registered investment adviser with the SEC and FINRA. This website and the Trading-Floor platform exist solely for research, demonstration, and educational purposes in support of that transition — not to provide investment advisory services or to solicit securities transactions. Trading-Floor does not provide any information, analysis, recommendations, or content in exchange for compensation of any kind. No fees are charged, no commissions are earned, and no payment-for-order-flow arrangements exist. All content on this platform is provided free of charge, strictly for informational and research purposes. Nothing on this website constitutes an offer or solicitation to buy or sell any security, or to provide investment advisory, brokerage, or financial planning services. Any information, analysis, or content generated by the Trading-Floor platform, including but not limited to stock picks, portfolio weightings, risk scores, historical performance testing results, and market commentary, is for informational and research purposes only and does not constitute personalized investment advice. Users should consult with a qualified, licensed financial professional before making any investment decisions. Trading-Floor does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of any information on this platform. Market data is provided by third-party sources and may be subject to delays. This website does not constitute a private placement memorandum or offering document of any kind. This is not an offer to sell securities.
